description: Standard university end-semester theory paper — Part A objective, Part B short, Part C long.
instructions:
1. Answer all questions.
2. Part A is compulsory.
3. In Part B, answer any 4 out of 6.
4. In Part C, answer any 2 out of 3.

sections.section_instruction: Answer any 4 of the following 6 questions. 5 marks each.
Answer any 2 of the following 3 questions. 10 marks each.
